_comment: Canonical Agile ticket-lifecycle board, encoded as a nullTickets pipeline. Mirrors lightwave-core task_statuses v3.0.0 (the 'Agile Scrum Ceremonies & Event' board). Two lanes share one pipeline: bugs are tasks whose lane converges into the delivery lane at 'prioritized'. The diagram's orange boxes (Add to Sprint, Release Notes, Gather Info) are transition TRIGGERS here; the yellow diamonds are decision branches = multiple triggers off one state. POST this to /pipelines.

open.description: Submitted and accepted; not yet groomed. Shared entry for the delivery and bug lanes.

prioritized.description: Groomed and prioritized; ready to dispatch. Bug-lane tasks rejoin here.

in_design.description: Added to a sprint; design in progress.

in_review.description: Under review; advance is gated on a no-blockers verdict.

triage.description: Bug under triage: reproducible? intended? enough info?

need_more_info.description: Blocked pending more information; returns to triage once gathered.

awaiting_prioritization.description: Triaged and confirmed; waiting to rejoin the board at prioritized.

not_a_bug.description: Reported behaviour is intended — not a defect.

cannot_reproduce.description: Could not reproduce the reported defect.
